title: Fractured Arcana Card
description: Schema for card JSON files in Data/Cards/. Validates card structure, halves, targeting, and effects.

id.description: Unique card identifier. Convention: schoolname_cardname in lowercase with underscores.

name.description: Display name shown in the UI.

school.description: Wizard school this card belongs to. Must match the CardSchool enum exactly.

status.description:
Controls whether this card is loaded into the game. Required on every card — no card may exist without a declared status.

  'ready' — Fully built and integrated. Loads into CardDatabase normally. Appears in CardLibrary and is draftable.
  'wip'   — Built but not yet balanced or fully tested. Loads only when DevMode is enabled in CardLoaderV2. Does not appear in CardLibrary.
  'stub'  — Placeholder only. Never loaded regardless of build mode. Effect chains may be empty or missing.

can_channel.description: Whether this half can be channeled. When true, the player may spend 1 extra mana to cast the next upgrade stage of this half instead of the base version.

upgrades.description: Ordered list of upgrade nodes. Each node patches the card's JSON for a given tier and branch.

CardHalf.description: One playable half of a card (top or bottom).

mana.description: Mana cost to play this half.

speed.description: When this half can be played.

rules_text.description: Human-readable description of the effect shown on the card.

tags.description: Element and school tags read at cast time by attunement, buff systems, and targeting selectors. Required on every half — use an empty array [] for halves with no elemental or school identity.

requires.description:
Pre-cast validation checks. Card cannot be played unless ALL conditions are met. Checked in CheckCastRequirements() in CombatManager.

Tile-target checks (block selection of invalid tiles via the targeter):
  'memorial_tile'         — Targeted tile must have an active memorial.
  'memorial_or_spirit_tile' — Targeted tile must have a memorial OR be occupied by a friendly spirit.
  'fire_tile'             — Targeted tile must be Fire terrain or imbued with Fire.
  'ice_tile'              — Targeted tile must be Ice terrain or imbued with Frost.
  'storm_tile'            — Targeted tile must be Storm terrain or imbued with Lightning.
  'stone_tile'            — Targeted tile must be Stone terrain or imbued with Earth.
  'empty_tile'            — Targeted tile must have no occupant.

Board-state checks (evaluated against global game state at cast time):
  'any_memorial'          — At least one memorial must exist anywhere on the board.
  'any_spirit'            — At least one friendly spirit must be alive on the board.
  'spirit_or_memorial'    — At least one friendly spirit OR one memorial must exist.

Other:
  'ally_adjacent'         — A friendly unit must be adjacent to the caster.
  'enemy_adjacent'        — An enemy unit must be adjacent to the caster.

Targeting.description: Targeting strategy for this card half.

type.description: Targeting strategy. Must match a key registered in CardScriptRegistry.RegisterBuiltins() under RegisterTargeter.

range.description: Maximum tile distance from caster the target may sit at. Used by: unit, tile, cone, nearest_to_target, element_tile, empty_tile.

radius.description: Radius (in tiles) of the area-of-effect. Used by: aoe, ring.

length.description: Length (in tiles) of a line target. Used by: line.

enemies_only.description: Restrict the selection to enemy-controlled units. Used by: unit, aoe, cone, line, by_tag.

count.description: Maximum number of targets to select. Used by: adjacent_to_target.

los.description: Require line of sight from caster to target. Used by: unit.

include_tiles.description: Include empty hex tiles (not just units) in the selection. Used by: aoe, ring, line, adjacent_to_target.

element.description: Element key used to filter tiles. Used by: element_tile.

tag.description: Tag key (e.g. 'fire', 'undead') used to filter units. Used by: by_tag.

Effect.description: An effect node — leaf or composite. Must always have a non-empty 'type'. An effect object with no type or with type:'' is invalid and will be flagged here before it silently becomes an EmptyEffect at runtime. If an effect is not yet authored, mark the card status as 'stub' or 'wip' rather than leaving type blank.

type.description: Effect type key. Lowercase. Must be registered in CardScriptRegistry.RegisterBuiltins().

amount.description: Generic magnitude. Used by: damage, heal, shield, armor, gain_mana, self_damage, remove_armor, buff_all_spirits (stat amount), gain_grief.

radius.description: Radius (in tiles) of an area effect. Used by: aoe_all, imbue_area, consume_element_tile, terraform, elemental_convergence, primordial_surge, tectonic_shatter, create_maelstrom, cataclysm, hallow_area, ossuary_aura, elder_aura.

damage.description: Per-hit damage figure for effects that pair area with a damage value. Used by: aoe_all, consume_element_tile, terraform, create_maelstrom, memorial_strike_all, dirge_pulse, mass_departure.

damage_per_element.description: Damage dealt per unique element present. Used by: ragnarok.

damage_per_tile.description: Damage dealt per affected tile. Used by: tectonic_shatter, cataclysm, push_damage.

bonus_damage.description: Bonus damage modifier. Used by: imbue_tile, avatar_transform.

element.description: Element key (fire, ice, storm, stone, etc.). Used by: imbue_tile, imbue_area, imbue_path, consume_element_tile.

tiles.description: Tiles to push, pull, or move. NOTE: this is 'tiles' not 'amount' — a common typo source. Used by: move, push, push_damage, pull, advance_all_spirits, pull_all_to_memorial.

collision_damage.description: Bonus damage dealt when a pushed unit collides with an obstacle. Used by: push, dirge_pulse, mass_departure.

turns.description: Duration in turns. Used by: avatar_transform, create_maelstrom, hollow_mantle, open_gate, hallow_tile, create_memorial_ground.

bonus_speed.description: Bonus movement speed. Used by: avatar_transform.

armor.description: Armor to grant. Used by: avatar_transform.

freezes.description: When true, the effect also applies the 'frozen' status. Used by: create_maelstrom.

half_to_allies.description: When true, allies take half the damage the enemies take. Used by: ragnarok.

move.description: Tiles to move during an imbued path. Used by: imbue_path.

armor_per_tile.description: Armor granted per tile of imbued movement. Used by: imbue_path.

count.description: Number of items to produce or consume. Used by: draw (cards drawn), summon (units summoned), consume_memorials_for_champion.

unit.description: Identifier of the unit kind to summon. Resolved at runtime against the summon registry. Used by: summon, summon_spirit, pull_memorials_and_merge.

min.description: Minimum damage floor. Used by: damage_by_distance.

max.description: Maximum damage ceiling. Used by: damage_by_distance.

per_tile.description: Damage added per tile of distance. Used by: damage_by_distance.

height.description: Height (in tile units) to raise terrain to. Used by: raise_terrain.

attunement_set_to.description: Target attunement counter value the effect snaps the caster to. Used by: elemental_convergence. See README §7 — distinct from the deprecated 'attunement_counters' field.

tiles_per_draw.description: Tiles affected per card drawn. Used by: cataclysm.

attunement_counters.description: DEPRECATED — was used by an older form of elemental_convergence. Use 'attunement_set_to' instead. Retained in the schema only because one legacy card still references it; the runtime ignores this field.

cards_per_tiles.description: DEPRECATED — no runtime effect reads this field. Retained only because one legacy card still references it. Likely meant to be 'tiles_per_draw' on cataclysm.

status.description: Status effect to apply. Used by: apply_status, apply_status_to_all_spirits.

duration.description: Duration in turns for a status effect. Used by: apply_status, apply_status_to_all_spirits.

steps.description: Ordered child effects. Used by: sequence.

hp.description: Base hit points of the summoned unit. Used by: summon_spirit.

speed.description: Movement speed of the summoned unit. 0 = immobile. Used by: summon_spirit.

strength.description: Memorial strength to create. Used by: create_memorial, mark_on_death_memorial.

amount_per.description: Magnitude per memorial or grief charge. Used by: armor_per_memorial, shield_per_memorial, damage_per_memorial, armor_per_grief, armor_per_grief_spent.

fraction.description: Fraction of a value (0.0–1.0). Used by: heal_fraction_of_damage.

damage_per_grief.description: Damage to deal per grief charge spent. Used by: grief_discharge_damage.

choose_amount.description: When true, the player chooses how much grief to spend (rather than spending all). Used by: grief_discharge_damage.

min_spend.description: Minimum grief required to spend when choose_amount is true. Used by: grief_discharge_damage.

stat.description: Stat name to buff on spirits. Used by: buff_all_spirits.

attack_if_adjacent.description: When true, spirits that are already adjacent to an enemy attack instead of advancing. Used by: advance_all_spirits.

grant_attack_if_reached.description: When true, spirits that reach an enemy after advancing are granted an attack action. Used by: advance_all_spirits.

advance_again_on_kill.description: Bonus tiles a spirit may advance after scoring a kill. Used by: advance_all_spirits.

on_arrive_advance.description: Tiles the summoned unit automatically advances toward the nearest enemy on arrival. Used by: summon_spirit, pull_memorials_and_merge.

revive_hp.description: HP at which a spirit revives after falling. Used by: apply_status_to_all_spirits with status undying_turn.

on_death_memorial_count.description: Number of memorials to create when this summoned unit dies. Used by: summon_spirit.

on_death_grief.description: Grief granted to the caster when this summoned unit dies. Used by: summon_spirit.

spirit_buff_damage.description: Bonus damage granted to spirits within aura range. Used by: elder_aura.

spirit_buff_range.description: Tile range of the spirit buff aura. Used by: elder_aura.

spirit_regen.description: HP regenerated by spirits per turn while within aura range. Used by: ossuary_aura, create_memorial_ground.

spirit_regen_range.description: Tile range of the spirit regen aura. Used by: ossuary_aura.

grief_per_turn.description: Grief gained per turn while the effect is active. Used by: hollow_mantle.

draw_per_turn.description: Cards drawn at the start of each turn while the effect is active. Used by: memorial_seat_aura.

summon_discount.description: Mana discount on summon spells cast targeting this tile. Used by: create_memorial_ground.

push.description: Tiles to push enemies away. Used by: dirge_pulse, mass_departure.

mana_per.description: Mana gained per memorial consumed. Used by: consume_all_memorials_in_range.

draw_per.description: Cards drawn per memorial consumed. Used by: consume_all_memorials_in_range, consume_all_memorials_global.

grief_per.description: Grief gained per memorial consumed. Used by: consume_all_memorials_in_range.

range.description: Search range in tiles. Used by: pull_memorials_and_merge, pull_all_to_memorial, pull_to_memorial, consume_memorials_for_champion.

merge_unit.description: Unit kind to summon when two memorials merge. Used by: pull_memorials_and_merge.

merge_hp.description: HP of the merged unit. Used by: pull_memorials_and_merge.

merge_damage.description: Damage of the merged unit. Used by: pull_memorials_and_merge.

merge_speed.description: Speed of the merged unit. Used by: pull_memorials_and_merge.

scale_with_strength.description: When true, merged unit stats scale with the combined memorial strength. Used by: pull_memorials_and_merge.

remainder_unit.description: Unit kind to summon from unmerged (odd) memorials. Used by: pull_memorials_and_merge.

remainder_hp.description: HP of the remainder unit. Used by: pull_memorials_and_merge.

remainder_damage.description: Damage of the remainder unit. Used by: pull_memorials_and_merge.

remainder_speed.description: Speed of the remainder unit. Used by: pull_memorials_and_merge.

hp_per_spirit.description: When true, each summoned spirit's HP equals the number of other friendly spirits in play. Used by: summon_spirit_from_all_memorials.

base_hp.description: Base HP before the per-spirit bonus is added. Used by: summon_spirit_from_all_memorials.

inherit_memorial_name.description: When true, the summoned spirit takes the name recorded on the source memorial. Used by: summon_spirit_from_all_memorials.

bonus_damage_per_strength.description: Additional damage per point of memorial strength on the source tile. Used by: summon_spirit_from_all_memorials.

auto_rise_range.description: Spirits within this many tiles of a hallowed tile automatically rise from memorials at turn start. Used by: hallow_tile.

damage_before.description: Damage dealt to all enemies before pushing them. Used by: push_all_to_memorial.

damage_on_land.description: Damage dealt when an enemy lands on a memorial after being pushed. Used by: push_all_to_memorial, mass_departure.

memorial_strength.description: Strength of memorials left behind. Used by: mass_departure.

enemy_on_enter_status.description: Status applied to enemies that enter hallowed ground. Used by: hallow_area upgrade patches.

enemy_on_enter_duration.description: Duration in turns of the on-enter status effect. Used by: hallow_area upgrade patches.

draw_count.description: Number of cards to draw. Alias for 'count' on draw effects where 'count' is already claimed by another field.

amount_per_strength.description: Bonus amount per point of memorial strength. Used by upgrade patches on armour/damage scaling effects.

Predicate.description: A boolean condition for use in conditional effects. The 'type' string must be registered in CardScriptRegistry.RegisterBuiltins() under RegisterPredicate.

type.description: Predicate kind. Registered values include: always_true, was_lethal, target_on_tile, target_adjacent_to_tile, target_adjacent_to_caster, caster_on_terrain, has_elements_near_caster.

tile.description: Tile-type key the predicate checks against. Used by: target_on_tile, target_adjacent_to_tile. Valid values include: 'memorial', 'stone', 'ice', 'fire', 'storm'.

terrain.description: Terrain-type key the predicate checks the caster's footing against. Used by: caster_on_terrain.

elements.description: List of element keys to look for near the caster. Used by: has_elements_near_caster.

range.description: Search radius in tiles. Used by: has_elements_near_caster.

element.description: Reserved for predicates that filter by a single element. Currently unused by any registered predicate; retained for forward compatibility.

status.description: Reserved for predicates that test status presence. Currently unused by any registered predicate; retained for forward compatibility.

element_tag.description: Reserved for predicates that filter by element tag. Currently unused by any registered predicate; retained for forward compatibility.

threshold.description: Reserved for predicates that compare against a numeric threshold (e.g. attunement >= n). Currently unused by any registered predicate.

UpgradeNode.description: A single upgrade stage for one branch path.

tier.description: Upgrade stage this node applies at (1-4).

half.description: Card half this will be applied to.

top_name.description: Replacement name for the top half when this branch is active.

bottom_name.description: Replacement name for the bottom half when this branch is active.

description.description: Flavour description of what this upgrade does. Shown in the upgrade screen.

changes.description: List of JSON patch operations to apply to the card's base definition.

UpgradeChange.description: A single field patch within an upgrade node.

field.description: Dot-notation path into the half's JSON (e.g. 'effect.amount', 'rules_text', 'requires').

value.description: Replacement value. Can be any JSON type — string, number, boolean, object, or array.
